astrologicalFacts: The word 'zodiac' comes from the Greek word meaning 'circle of animals.'
There are 12 zodiac signs, and each sign has its own strengths and weaknesses.
Astrology is one of the oldest sciences in the world, dating back to ancient Babylon.
The 12 houses of the zodiac represent different areas of life, from career to relationships.
Your rising sign, or ascendant, is the zodiac sign that was on the eastern horizon at the time of your birth.
